reasoning: The market value was 1% on Dec 11, and my searches through Dec 21, 2025 turned up absolutely no evidence of a major sustained US-Iran war or significant ground troop deployment in the final weeks of 2025. The US conducted nuclear site strikes in June 2025 during the Israel-Iran war, but this was a limited operation and concluded quickly without meeting the resolution criteria (which require a sustained campaign, regime change intent, or significant ground troops, plus reciprocal declarations of war). With only 10 days left in the year, there is not enough time to go from peace to a mutually acknowledged, sustained total war. Therefore, the probability remains at the rock-bottom level.
